name: the-price-of-inequality
description: Joseph E. Stiglitz's The Price of Inequality — an executable toolkit exploring how inequality damages economies, democracy, and society: the causes of inequality, its consequences, and what can be done about it
useCase: Helps anyone understand the causes and consequences of economic inequality — from how the 1% captures the gains to the systemic reforms needed for a fairer economy.
knownRisks: The book presents a progressive economic perspective on inequality
